title: Vanity: Ancient Tool Variants
description: Weapons forged by an ancient civilization.
body:
# "Weapons forged by an ancient civilization."

A pack for the mod Vanity: Core, adding tools based on the theming of the Deep Dark's ancient civilization.

When installed alongside Vanity: Core, Ancient Concept Art becomes available to the player in the creative inventory and through villager trading.


Ancient Designs can be used at a Styling Table to modify the appearance of higher-level Minecraft tools, as well as mattocks from NewWorld.

![Item skins for most tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5550a971b754791aca1e13c7e53319132e351618.png)
